---
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(reactable)
library(plotly)
library(htmltools)
library(lubridate)

TEAM <- "東大"

final_ratings <- read_csv("../../data_out/ratings/final_ratings.csv",
                           show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))
rating_hist   <- read_csv("../../data_out/ratings/rating_history.csv",
                           show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))
game_results  <- read_csv("../../data_out/ratings/game_results_with_ratings.csv",
                           show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(gamedate = as.Date(gamedate))
teams_info    <- readxl::read_excel("../../data_out/teamdata.xlsx") |>
  mutate(
    c1 = paste0("#", ColorCode1),
    c2 = paste0("#", if_else(is.na(ColorCode2), ColorCode1, ColorCode2)),
    c3 = paste0("#", if_else(is.na(ColorCode3),
                             if_else(is.na(ColorCode2), ColorCode1, ColorCode2),
                             ColorCode3))
  )

# このチームの情報
team_info      <- teams_info |> filter(TeamShortName == TEAM) |> slice(1)
team_full_name <- if (nrow(team_info) > 0) team_info$TeamName   else TEAM
league_name    <- if (nrow(team_info) > 0) team_info$LeagueName else "不明"
c1 <- if (nrow(team_info) > 0) team_info$c1 else "#111111"
c2 <- if (nrow(team_info) > 0) team_info$c2 else "#FFFFFF"

# レートと順位
all_ranked <- final_ratings |>
  arrange(rank)
team_row       <- all_ranked |> filter(team == TEAM)
current_rating <- if (nrow(team_row) > 0) team_row$display_rating[1] else NA
current_rank   <- if (nrow(team_row) > 0) team_row$rank[1] else NA
total_teams    <- nrow(all_ranked)

current_year <- max(year(game_results$gamedate))

TEAM_SLUG <- c(
  "東大"   = "todai",  "明治" = "meiji", "慶應"   = "keio",
  "早稲田" = "waseda", "立教" = "rikkyo", "法政"  = "hosei"
)
LEAGUE_SLUG <- c("東京六大学" = "tokyo6")

# 全期間平均・標準偏差（ゲームレート表示用）
global_mean <- mean(rating_hist$rating)
global_sd   <- sd(rating_hist$rating)
to_disp <- function(r) round(50 + 10 * (r - global_mean) / global_sd, 1)
```

<!-- ヘッダー (チームカラー accent bar) -->
<div style="border-left: 5px solid `r c1`; padding-left: 18px; margin-bottom: 40px; padding-top: 28px; padding-bottom: 22px; border-bottom: 1px solid #E8E8E8;">
  <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-end;">
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:2.1rem; font-weight:900; letter-spacing:-0.04em; line-height:1; color:`r c1`; margin-bottom:7px;">`r team_full_name`</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.7rem; color:#6B6B6B; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.1em;">
        <a href="../league/`r LEAGUE_SLUG[league_name]`.html"
           style="color:#6B6B6B; text-decoration:none;">`r league_name`</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align:right;">
      <div style="font-size:0.7rem; color:#6B6B6B; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.1em; margin-bottom:3px;">
        `r if (!is.na(current_rank)) paste0("全国 ", current_rank, " 位 / ", total_teams, " チーム") else "集計中"`
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:2.7rem; font-weight:900; letter-spacing:-0.05em; line-height:1; color:`r c1`;">`r if (!is.na(current_rating)) current_rating else "-"`</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.67rem; color:#AAAAAA; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.1em; margin-top:3px;">レート</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

## レーティング推移

```{r rating-chart}
team_hist <- rating_hist |>
  filter(team == TEAM) |>
  arrange(date)

if (nrow(team_hist) > 0) {
  plot_ly(
    data      = team_hist,
    x         = ~date,
    y         = ~display_rating,
    type      = "scatter",
    mode      = "lines+markers",
    name      = team_full_name,
    line      = list(color = c1, width = 2.5),
    marker    = list(color = c1, size = 4, line = list(color = c2, width = 1.5)),
    text      = ~paste0(format(date, "%Y/%m/%d"), "<br>",
                        "レート: ", round(display_rating, 1)),
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) |> layout(
    xaxis = list(
      title = "",
      gridcolor = "#EBEBEB",
      zeroline  = FALSE,
      rangeselector = list(
        buttons = list(
          list(count = 1, label = "今年", step = "year", stepmode = "todate"),
          list(count = 5, label = "5年", step = "year", stepmode = "backward"),
          list(step = "all", label = "全期間")
        )
      ),
      rangeslider = list(visible = FALSE)
    ),
    yaxis  = list(title = list(text = "レ<br>ー<br>ト"), gridcolor = "#EBEBEB", zeroline = FALSE),
    margin = list(l = 60, r = 20, t = 20, b = 40),
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    plot_bgcolor  = "white",
    font = list(family = "Inter, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif")
  )
} else {
  cat('<p style="color:#AAA; font-style:italic; font-size:0.85rem;">試合データがありません。</p>')
}
```

## 試合結果

```{r games-table}
team_games <- game_results |>
  filter(team1 == TEAM | team2 == TEAM) |>
  mutate(
    is_team1  = (team1 == TEAM),
    opp       = if_else(is_team1, team2, team1),
    score_a   = if_else(is_team1, score1, score2),
    score_b   = if_else(is_team1, score2, score1),
    rate_a    = if_else(is_team1, r1_before, r2_before),
    rate_b    = if_else(is_team1, r2_before, r1_before),
    delta_own = if_else(is_team1, delta, -delta),
    result    = case_when(score_a > score_b ~ "W",
                          score_a < score_b ~ "L",
                          TRUE              ~ "D"),
    yr        = as.character(year(gamedate))
  ) |>
  left_join(teams_info |> select(TeamShortName, TeamName, c1),
            by = c("opp" = "TeamShortName")) |>
  rename(opp_full = TeamName, opp_c1 = c1) |>
  mutate(
    disp_a     = to_disp(rate_a),
    disp_b     = to_disp(rate_b),
    delta_disp = round(10 * delta_own / global_sd, 1)
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(gamedate)) |>
  select(yr, gamedate, gametype, result, disp_a, score_a, score_b,
         opp_full, opp_c1, disp_b, opp, delta_disp)

reactable(
  team_games,
  filterable      = TRUE,
  defaultFiltered = list(yr = as.character(current_year)),
  defaultPageSize = 15,
  showPageSizeOptions = TRUE,
  pageSizeOptions     = c(15, 50, 200),
  highlight = TRUE,
  columns = list(
    yr = colDef(
      name  = "年度",
      width = 72,
      align = "center",
      filterMethod = JS("(rows, columnId, filterValue) => {
        if (!filterValue) return rows;
        return rows.filter(row => String(row.values[columnId]) === filterValue);
      }"),
      filterInput = function(values, name) {
        yrs <- sort(unique(values), decreasing = TRUE)
        tags$select(
          style    = "width:100%; font-size:0.8rem;",
          onchange = sprintf(
            "Reactable.setFilter('games-table', '%s', event.target.value || undefined)", name
          ),
          tags$option(value = "", "全年度"),
          lapply(yrs, function(y) {
            opt <- tags$option(value = as.character(y), as.character(y))
            if (y == current_year) tagAppendAttributes(opt, selected = NA) else opt
          })
        )
      }
    ),
    gamedate = colDef(name = "日付", width = 108,
                      format = colFormat(date = TRUE, locales = "ja-JP")),
    gametype = colDef(name = "種別", width = 120),
    result   = colDef(
      name  = "結果", width = 55, align = "center",
      cell  = function(v) {
        cls <- switch(v, W = "result-w", L = "result-l", "result-d")
        sym <- switch(v, W = "\u25cb", L = "\u25cf", "\u25b3")
        tags$span(class = cls, sym)
      }
    ),
    disp_a  = colDef(name = "自レート", width = 90, align = "right",
                     format = colFormat(digits = 1)),
    score_a = colDef(
      name = "得点", width = 60, align = "center",
      style = function(v, ri) {
        if (!is.na(v) && v > team_games$score_b[ri])
          "font-weight:900; font-size:1rem;" else "color:#AAA;"
      }
    ),
    score_b = colDef(
      name = "失点", width = 60, align = "center",
      style = function(v, ri) {
        if (!is.na(v) && v > team_games$score_a[ri])
          "font-weight:900; font-size:1rem;" else "color:#AAA;"
      }
    ),
    delta_disp = colDef(
      name  = "変動", width = 72, align = "right",
      cell  = function(v) {
        if (is.na(v)) return(tags$span())
        cls <- if (v > 0) "change-up" else if (v < 0) "change-down" else "change-none"
        fmt <- if (v > 0) paste0("+", sprintf("%.1f", v)) else sprintf("%.1f", v)
        tags$span(class = cls, fmt)
      }
    ),
    opp_full = colDef(
      name = "対戦相手",
      cell = function(v, ri) {
        row <- team_games[ri, ]
        tags$span(
          tags$a(href  = paste0(TEAM_SLUG[row$opp], ".html"),
                 style = paste0("font-weight:700; text-decoration:none; color:", row$opp_c1),
                 v),
          tags$span(class = "rating-badge", paste0("(", row$disp_b, ")"))
        )
      }
    ),
    opp_c1 = colDef(show = FALSE), disp_b = colDef(show = FALSE),
    opp    = colDef(show = FALSE)
  ),
  elementId = "games-table"
)
```

<div class="back-links">
  <a href="../index.html"       class="back-link">&#8592; ランキングに戻る</a>
  <a href="../methodology.html" class="back-link">&#8594; 計算方法の詳細</a>
</div>
